sqlMap.select: SELECT A.*, dt1.departname AS unitname1, ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2, ut2.staffName AS policename2, GROUP_CONCAT( ft2.basicName ORDER BY ft2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS policename FROM ( SELECT t.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.basicName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS typename FROM p_wen_grade_t t LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, t.personneltype ) WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.ID = $id$ ) A LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft2.id, A.responsiblepolice ) LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON A.jurisdictunit1 = dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON A.jurisdictpolice1 = ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON A.jurisdictunit2 = dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON A.jurisdictpolice2 = ut2.id

SELECT A.*, dt1.departname AS unitname1, ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2, ut2.staffName AS policename2, GROUP_CONCAT( ft2.basicName ORDER BY ft2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS policename FROM ( SELECT t.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.basicName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS typename FROM p_wen_grade_t t LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, t.personneltype ) WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid = $personnelid$ ) A LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET( ft2.id, A.responsiblepolice ) LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON A.jurisdictunit1 = dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON A.jurisdictpolice1 = ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON A.jurisdictunit2 = dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON A.jurisdictpolice2 = ut2.id

SELECT COUNT(a.id) FROM (SELECT gt.id FROM p_wen_grade_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1=ut.id
WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
IFNULL((SELECT count(id) FROM p_relation_telnumber_t WHERE personnelid=gt.personnelid AND validflag>0 AND telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'),0)>0
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$unitname1$')
ut.staffName like '%$policename1$%'
($sqltype$)
($sqlpolice$)
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.jointcontrollevel != '存档'
gt.awaywill = '$awaywill$'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
ifnull((select CASE WHEN 43200>=UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) THEN 'green' WHEN UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))>43200 and 86400>=UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())- UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) THEN 'orange' ELSE 'red' END color from f_trajectory_t where personcard_number=pt.cardnumber GROUP BY personcard_number),'blue' ) = '$color$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
FIND_IN_SET($policeFilter$,gt.responsiblepolice)
GROUP BY gt.id) a

SELECT gt.*,pt.cardnumber,pt.personname,pt.homeplace,pt.persontype,pt.sexes,pt.zslabel2 AS typename,IFNULL(pt.maintainrate1,0) AS maintainrate1,
IFNULL(dt.departname,'') AS unitname1,IFNULL(ut.staffName,'') AS policename1, GROUP_CONCAT(bmt.basicName SEPARATOR ',') AS policename
FROM p_wen_grade_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON pt.jdunit1=dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1=ut.id LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bmt ON bmt.validflag > 0 AND bmt.id in (gt.responsiblepolice)
WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
IFNULL((SELECT count(id) FROM p_relation_telnumber_t WHERE personnelid=gt.personnelid AND validflag>0 AND telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'),0)>0
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$unitname1$')
ut.staffName like '%$policename1$%'
($sqltype$)
($sqlpolice$)
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.jointcontrollevel != '存档'
gt.awaywill = '$awaywill$'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
ifnull((select CASE WHEN 43200>=UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) THEN 'green' WHEN UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))>43200 and 86400>=UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())- UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) THEN 'orange' ELSE 'red' END color from f_trajectory_t where personcard_number=pt.cardnumber GROUP BY personcard_number),'blue' ) = '$color$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
FIND_IN_SET($policeFilter$,gt.responsiblepolice)
GROUP BY gt.id
$sortsql$,if(isnull(gt.jointcontrollevel),1,0),if(length(gt.jointcontrollevel),0,1),FIELD(gt.jointcontrollevel,'一级','二级','三级','自控','存档')
order by if(isnull(gt.jointcontrollevel),1,0),if(length(gt.jointcontrollevel),0,1),FIELD(gt.jointcontrollevel,'一级','二级','三级','自控','存档'),IFNULL(pt.maintainrate1,0) desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_wen_grade_t (personnelid,jurisdictunit1,jurisdictpolice1,policephone1,jointcontrollevel, personneltype,responsiblepolice, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$jurisdictunit1$,$jurisdictpolice1$,'$policephone1$','自控', '$personneltype$','$responsiblepolice$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_wen_grade_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT a.*,GROUP_CONCAT(pat.attributelabel SEPARATOR ',') AS typename FROM (SELECT gt.*, pt.personname,pt.cardnumber, pt.sexes,pt.usedname,pt.nickname, pt.marrystatus,pt.nation,pt.soldierstatus, pt.heathstatus,pt.politicalposition,pt.faith, pt.education,pt.persontype,pt.houseplace, pt.housepolice,pt.homeplace,pt.homepolice, pt.workplace,pt.workpolice,pt.feature, pt.speciality,pt.records,IFNULL(pt.maintainrate1,0) AS maintainrate1, pt.personheight,pt.netskillhabit,pt.zslabel2, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(prtt.telnumber,IF(prtt.imsi is NULL OR prtt.imsi='','',CONCAT('(IMSI:',prtt.imsi,')')))) FROM p_relation_telnumber_t prtt where prtt.validflag>0 AND prtt.isactivate=0 AND prtt.personnelid=gt.personnelid GROUP BY prtt.personnelid) as telnumber, rt.telephone,rt.relatedwifi, rt.relatedvehicle,rt.bankaccount,rt.netidentity, rt.netpayment,rt.relatedhouse,rt.relatedlegal, rt.relateddriver,rt.relatedpassport, wrt.conflictdetails,wrt.riskappeal, rst.lifepattern,rst.healthstate,rst.characteristic,rst.lifehabit, dt1.departname AS unitname1,ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2,ut2.staffName AS policename2 ,GROUP_CONCAT(bmt.basicName SEPARATOR ',') AS policename FROM p_wen_grade_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_telnumber_t rtt ON (rtt.personnelid=pt.id AND rtt.validflag>0) LEFT JOIN p_relation_t rt ON gt.personnelid=rt.personnelid LEFT JOIN p_wen_risk_t wrt ON (gt.personnelid=wrt.personnelid AND wrt.validflag=2) LEFT JOIN p_reality_show_t rst ON (gt.personnelid=rst.personnelid AND rst.validflag=2 AND rst.datalabel=1) LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON pt.jdunit1=dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1=ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON pt.jdunit2=dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2=ut2.id LEFT JOIN (select personcard_number,CASE WHEN 43200>=UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) THEN 'green' WHEN UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())-UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))>43200 and 86400>=UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now())- UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(max(appear_time),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) THEN 'orange' ELSE 'red' END color from f_trajectory_t GROUP BY personcard_number)A on A.personcard_number=pt.cardnumber LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bmt ON FIND_IN_SET(bmt.id,gt.responsiblepolice) AND bmt.validflag>0 WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
rtt.telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$unitname1$')
ut1.staffName like '%$policename1$%'
($sqltype$)
($sqlpolice$)
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.jointcontrollevel != '存档'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
IFNULL(A.color,'blue') = '$color$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
FIND_IN_SET($policeFilter$,gt.responsiblepolice)
GROUP BY gt.id) a LEFT JOIN p_attributelabel_t pat ON FIND_IN_SET(pat.id,a.zslabel2) AND rootid=1 GROUP BY a.id
$sortsql$,if(isnull(a.jointcontrollevel),1,0),if(length(a.jointcontrollevel),0,1),FIELD(a.jointcontrollevel,'一级','二级','三级','自控','存档')
order by if(isnull(a.jointcontrollevel),1,0),if(length(a.jointcontrollevel),0,1),FIELD(a.jointcontrollevel,'一级','二级','三级','自控','存档'),a.maintainrate1 desc
sqlMap.update: update p_wen_grade_t set jointcontrollevelapply=$jointcontrollevelapply$, jointcontrollevel='$jointcontrollevel$' where personnelid=$personnelid$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t (personnelid,jointcontrollevel_old,jointcontrollevel_new,applicantreason, applicantid,applicant,applicanttime) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$jointcontrollevel_old$','$jointcontrollevel_new$','$applicantreason$', $applicantid$,'$applicant$','$applicanttime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(1) from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t t1 left join p_personnel_t p on t1.personnelid = p.id left join sys_department_t dt ON p.jdunit1 = dt.id where 1=1
t1.personnelid=$personnelid$
t1.applicanttime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= t1.applicanttime
p.jdunit1 = '$homepolice$'
(p.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or p.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(p.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or p.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)

select t1.*,p.personname,p.cardnumber,IFNULL(dt.departname,'')as homepolice from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t t1 left join p_personnel_t p on p.id = t1.personnelid left join sys_department_t dt ON p.jdunit1 = dt.id where 1=1
t1.personnelid=$personnelid$
t1.applicanttime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= t1.applicanttime
p.jdunit1 = '$homepolice$'
(p.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or p.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(p.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or p.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
order by t1.id desc
select t1.* from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t t1 where t1.id=$id$ order by t1.id desc
select count(1) from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t t where t.personnelid=$personnelid$ and t.examinestatus=1
select t.* from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t t where t.personnelid=$personnelid$ and t.examinestatus=1

select wg.id,p.personname,wg.personnelid from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t wg on p.id=wg.personnelid where p.validflag>0 and wg.incontrollevel like CONCAT('%',#incontrolleve#,'%') and wg.validflag>0

select b.basicName text,count(p.id) value from sys_basic_msg_t b LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t wg on wg.incontrollevel=b.basicName and wg.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=wg.personnelid and p.validflag>0 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(b.basicName,#levelString#) and basicType=22 GROUP BY b.basicName order by FIELD(b.basicName,'在控','临控','在京','在宁','下落不明','不在控','归档');

select count(p.id) from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t wg on p.id=wg.personnelid where p.validflag>0 and wg.validflag>0
wg.jointcontrollevel = #jointcontrollevel#

select b.basicName text,count(p.id) value from sys_basic_msg_t b LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t wg on wg.jointcontrollevel=b.basicName and wg.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id=wg.personnelid and p.validflag>0 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(b.basicName,#levelString#) and basicType=47 GROUP BY b.basicName order by FIELD(b.basicName,'一级','二级','三级','自控','存档');
select count(*) from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t where examineresult=1 and reviewertime like CONCAT('%',DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d'),'%')

select count(*) from( select id,CASE jointcontrollevel_old WHEN '' THEN 0 WHEN '存档' THEN 1 WHEN '自控' THEN 2 WHEN '三级' THEN 3 WHEN '二级' THEN 4 WHEN '一级' THEN 5 END as old,CASE jointcontrollevel_new WHEN '' THEN 0 WHEN '存档' THEN 1 WHEN '自控' THEN 2 WHEN '三级' THEN 3 WHEN '二级' THEN 4 WHEN '一级' THEN 5 END as new from p_wen_jointcontrollevel_t where examineresult=1 and reviewertime like CONCAT('%',DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d'),'%'))A where A.new>=A.old

SELECT id,attributelabel name,getAttributelabelCount(id) value from p_attributelabel_t WHERE FIND_IN_SET(attributelabel,#levelString#) and parentid=1 and validflag>0 and examineflag=1 ORDER BY value,id;

select count(p.id) from sys_department_t sd LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t wg on wg.validflag>0 and wg.jointcontrollevel=#jointcontrollevel# LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on sd.id=p.jdunit1 and p.id=wg.personnelid and p.validflag>0 where sd.departtype=4 and sd.validflag>0 GROUP BY sd.departname ORDER BY sd.id

select A.basicName as name,count(p.id) as value from( select * from sys_basic_msg_t where basicType=24 and validflag>0)A LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t wg on FIND_IN_SET(A.id,wg.responsiblepolice) and A.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.id = wg.personnelid and p.validflag>0 and FIND_IN_SET(#personlabel#,p.zslabel1) GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY A.id

select p.id,p.personname,p.cardnumber,sf.fileallName,'' as appellation,0 as relationid,1 as riskpersonnel,IFNULL(sf.validflag ,0) as validflag from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_personnel_photo_t ph on ph.personnelid=p.id and ph.defaultflag=1 and ph.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on sf.id=ph.fileid and sf.validflag>0 where p.id=$personnelid$ and p.validflag>0
not FIND_IN_SET(p.cardnumber,'$cardnumber$')
UNION select p.id,p.personname,p.cardnumber,sf.fileallName,sr.appellation,sr.id as relationid,sr.riskpersonnel,IFNULL(sf.validflag ,0) as validflag from p_social_relations_t sr LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on sr.cardnumber=p.cardnumber and p.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_photo_t ph on ph.personnelid=p.id and ph.defaultflag=1 and ph.validflag>0 LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on sf.id=ph.fileid and sf.validflag>0 where sr.personnelid=$personnelid$ and sr.validflag>0 and sr.riskpersonnel=1
not FIND_IN_SET(p.cardnumber,'$cardnumber$')
UNION select 0 as id,sr.personname,sr.cardnumber,'' as fileallName,sr.appellation,sr.id as relationid,sr.riskpersonnel,0 as validflag from p_social_relations_t sr where sr.personnelid=$personnelid$ and sr.validflag>0 and sr.riskpersonnel=0
not FIND_IN_SET(sr.cardnumber,'$cardnumber$')
